cases.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 harness wiki 구조를 설치해줘

assertions.text: The agent runs scripts/scaffold.sh which creates .harness/wiki/{decisions,concepts,agents}/ directories.
state.json is created with project name, version, and sprint fields.
plan.md is created with a basic task queue template.
wiki/INDEX.md is created with a navigation table and usage rules.
Each subdirectory (decisions, concepts, agents) has a _TEMPLATE.md file.
The agent runs scripts/validate-wiki.sh and reports PASS or WARN.
The agent provides a summary of created files and next steps.

cases.prompt: harness setup 다시 실행해줘. 이미 .harness/ 디렉토리가 있어.

assertions.text: The agent detects existing .harness/ and reports RECON findings.
scaffold.sh skips already-existing directories and files (SKIP messages).
Existing state.json, plan.md, and INDEX.md are NOT overwritten.
The agent runs validate-wiki.sh to confirm structure integrity.
The agent checks for <!-- harness-wiki:v1 --> marker in CLAUDE.md.
If marker is absent, adds the wiki index section with proper markers.
The <!-- context-guardian-rules:v1 --> marker and its content are preserved.
Running again does not duplicate the wiki index section.
